emergency_definition: fire panel alarm on monitored site
access control lockout at critical facility
full camera outage at secured property

BUSINESS HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling SecureGuard Systems. How can we assist you today?
What is the purpose of your call?
May I have your name and phone number, please?
I'm going to route your call to our support team. Please hold for just a moment.
We are still attempting a secure handoff and your case is in active review.
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
Thank you for calling SecureGuard Systems. Have a great day.

AFTER HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling SecureGuard Systems. Our office is currently closed. How can we assist you?
What is the purpose of your call?
I'm going to transfer you to our overnight monitoring desk. Please hold for just a moment.
We are still attempting a secure handoff and your case is in active review. We will call you back within 8 minutes.
I'm going to take some details and our support team will call you back during business hours.
Thank you for calling SecureGuard Systems. We will review your case and call you back as soon as possible.

call_transfer_protocol.message_if_fails: We are still attempting a secure handoff and your case is in active review

fallback_protocol: Reassure critical priority and response team calls back within 8 minutes
tool_invocation_note: No tool invocation is required for this configuration.
